headline: Salesforce (CRM) As Downgrades Test The Case For An Undervalued AI Pivot
summary: Multiple downgrades have put Salesforce (CRM) under pressure, as Morgan Stanley and KeyBanc questioned whether its heavy AI and Agentforce investments are meaningfully lifting organic growth while legacy businesses continue to drag on performance. See our latest analysis for Salesforce. headline: Salesforce (CRM) Lands Broad Air Force Role Managing A Global Military Vehicle Fleet
summary: Salesforce's Missionforce National Security platform has been broadly adopted by the U.S. Air Force for global fleet management. The 441st Vehicle Support Chain Operations Squadron is using Missionforce to manage vehicles and support mission readiness across worldwide operations. The rollout reflects increased use of secure cloud and AI-integrated tools in mission-critical U.S. defense logistics.
